on_screen_text:
જ્યારે હું ₹3000 આપીને English coaching class માં જતો હતો. [When I used to go to English coaching class by paying ₹3000.]
જ્યારે મેં MySivi app ના AI teacher સાથે English શીખવાનું શરૂ કર્યું. [When I started learning English with MySivi app's AI teacher.]
summary: This split-screen meme ad compares traditional English coaching classes with the MySivi app. The left side depicts sadness over paying ₹3000 for offline classes, while the right side shows joyful dancing to represent learning with the app's AI teacher.
